creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is not the place to request a new driver. Please contact yongari@ 
where possible and ask him what might be possible. The PR database is 
for known and found problems that need resolving. Thanks for the 
willingness though to make FreeBSD better, and ofcourse for using it in 
the first place.
